name: Execution
description: Run code, execute shell commands, manage processes, deploy artifacts, interact with OS
notes: Proven for Manus (sandbox shell execution, Python, Node.js, git). Unsupported for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini in standard mode. Candidate for Codex (via tools).

chatgpt.note: No direct execution. Indirect via task.create → Manus relay.

claude.note: No direct execution in standard API mode.
